Pancakes

author: Katie Blatt

Prep time ->

Cook time ->

Yield: 2 persons

Ingredients

3 T. butter, melted 3 T. sugar 1 egg 3/4 tsp. salt 2 1/2 tsp. baking powder 1 1/4 cup flour 3/4 cup milk

Directions

Mix together the butter and sugar. Add egg and mix. Add salt, baking powder and flour. Gradually add milk; add more if necessary.
